config.rationale: Testing vLLM with --language-model-only flag to bypass VLM overhead for text-only benchmarks, combined with chunked prefill and prefix caching for maximum throughput optimization.

llm_commentary: The latest experiment with vLLM's --language-model-only flag achieved moderate throughput (2270.8) but failed to beat the top performers. The 0.0ms TTFT appears to be a measurement error given the failed smoke tests. The configuration with chunked prefill and prefix caching didn't provide the expected throughput boost.
docker_command: docker run --name bench-vllm-19f86582118b --gpus all --shm-size 16g --network host -v /root/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface -d -e SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2=1 vllm/vllm-openai:latest --model Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --tensor-parallel-size 1 --dtype auto --gpu-memory-utilization 0.95 --max-model-len 32768 --max-num-seqs 512 --max-num-batched-tokens 16384 --enable-chunked-prefill --enable-prefix-caching --language-model-only --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder --reasoning-parser qwen3
